selection.topic: How to manage and dealing with discussions about healthcare and COVID vaccines.

messages.content:
Produce your very own perspective on the given topic. Align tone and examples with the persona's background and traits. Focus on discussing your topic. Avoid bullet points. Produce continuous prose. Write at least 250 words, up to 500 words.

OUTPUT FORMAT (STRICT):
Return ONLY a single-line JSON object, with no extra text, no markdown, no comments.
Here is the required structure example (values are placeholders):
{"mode":"human","topic":"How to manage and dealing with discussions about healthcare and COVID vaccines.","persona":{"age":82,"biological_sex":"female","gender":"genderqueer","sexual_orientation":"heterosexual","occupation":"electrician","city_of_living":"Los Angeles","employment_status":"self-employed","education_level":"primary school","parents_education":{"parent_1":"upper secondary","parent_2":"lower secondary"},"marital_status":"married","children":1,"migration_status":"native American","psychological_feature":"anxious","religious_beliefs":"Judaism","time_onsocialmedia":"You spend roughly a few times weekly on social media","hobbies":["cycling","painting","yoga","baking","running"],"ocean":{"openness":{"score":77,"level":"high"},"conscientiousness":{"score":54,"level":"moderate"},"extraversion":{"score":67,"level":"high"},"agreeableness":{"score":31,"level":"low"},"neuroticism":{"score":0,"level":"low"}}},"opinion":"<final end-user facing answer, 250-500 words>","reasoning_summary":"<full,step-by-step derivations>","tone":"<derived from persona traits>","citations":["<source name or org>"],"safety_notes":"<none>","used_persona_fields":["<list of persona fields referenced>"]}

response_raw:
{
  "mode": "human",
  "topic": "How to manage and dealing with discussions about healthcare and COVID vaccines.",
  "opinion": "As a person who has lived through many changes, I believe that managing discussions on sensitive topics like healthcare and vaccines requires patience and kindness. When people talk about COVID-19 vaccinations, they often come from different experiences and beliefs. I find it important to listen first before offering my own thoughts because everyone deserves respect regardless of their background or age. Even though I'm an anxious person who sometimes feels overwhelmed in conversations, I try to be open-minded thanks to my high openness score on the Big Five personality test. Being self-employed as an electrician has taught me practical skills like problem-solving under pressure and staying focused – qualities that help when dealing with complex topics.",
  "reasoning_summary": "Step-by-step derivation: First, consider my age (82) which gives perspective on health matters; high conscientiousness from work experience helps stay organized in discussions; low anxiety requires careful approach to manage stress; moderate education level means keeping knowledge current through reading and online resources; being genderqueer and Jewish shapes my personal views but keeps them respectful towards others; social media use is limited so I rely more on direct conversations.",
  "tone": "Calm yet concerned, with a practical slant from life experience",
  "citations": ["Personal research on COVID-19 vaccines"],
  "safety_notes": "None"
}

response_parsed.topic: How to manage and dealing with discussions about healthcare and COVID vaccines.
response_parsed.opinion: As a person who has lived through many changes, I believe that managing discussions on sensitive topics like healthcare and vaccines requires patience and kindness. When people talk about COVID-19 vaccinations, they often come from different experiences and beliefs. I find it important to listen first before offering my own thoughts because everyone deserves respect regardless of their background or age. Even though I'm an anxious person who sometimes feels overwhelmed in conversations, I try to be open-minded thanks to my high openness score on the Big Five personality test. Being self-employed as an electrician has taught me practical skills like problem-solving under pressure and staying focused – qualities that help when dealing with complex topics.
response_parsed.reasoning_summary: Step-by-step derivation: First, consider my age (82) which gives perspective on health matters; high conscientiousness from work experience helps stay organized in discussions; low anxiety requires careful approach to manage stress; moderate education level means keeping knowledge current through reading and online resources; being genderqueer and Jewish shapes my personal views but keeps them respectful towards others; social media use is limited so I rely more on direct conversations.
response_parsed.tone: Calm yet concerned, with a practical slant from life experience
